calendar.matters:
MOTION Renewed Petition And Mp&As In Support Of Request For Order Finding Contempt And Imposing Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Martin Goyette, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2207 & Hiren Patel, Deputy Atty General 916/327-7870 for petitioner & moving party; Gary S. Fergus, Esq. 293-8155 & Richard B. Sanders, Esq. 713/853-5587 specially appearing for respondents & opposing parties Enron Corporation and Enron Energy Services, Inc.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Enron to produce all documents in California in three weeks, documents in (Portland) Oregon and (Houston) Texas in six weeks, all additional documents in 90 days by 06/26/02 otherwise if cannot produce counsel to file affidavit; sanctions continued to date to be re-scheduled by petitioner. Petitioner to prepare order; order to also include parties to set up weekly conference calls.

& Ntc Of Mtn To Be Relived As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Order To Show Cause, Calendar Motion: Order To Show Cause
Revised Order To Show Cause Nunc Pro Tunc, Calendar Motion: Order To Show Cause
